title: Bloody mace
description: This makes the mace bloody! it changes the mace texture to have more... gore i would say! cool and good for roleplay videos?
body:
This makes the mace bloody! it changes the mace texture to have more... gore i would say! cool and good for roleplay videos? Consider checking out my new other projects! it would be greatly appreciated! love yall :3
